item.description: Both sides had agreed on a fresh round of negotiations to try to strike lasting peace.

item.description: Here are all the changes to road-related costs as of July 1.

item.title: Boxing Australia in chaos as CEO Dinah Glykidis quits after the departure of national integrity manager
item.description: Weeks out from the Commonwealth Games the governing body is dealing with bombshell claims and multiple vacancies.

item.title: Ukrainian tycoon Vadym Yermolaiev targeted in Monaco explosion
item.description: The suspect ‘had walked around the area several times while waiting for the victims’, police say.

item.description: Loved ones have issued an appeal for information, desperate to confirm he is safe.

item.title: Bailey Smith credits cognitive behavioural therapy for newfound temperament in 2026
item.description: The deep-thinking AFL midfielder has learned to ‘tame the beast’ inside of him through a new method.

item.title: This Victorian mum was 32 when she lost the ability to speak — until quick thinking from doctors hours away saved her
item.description: ‘I can’t even explain the feeling. I went to go to my husband to say something’s wrong ... and I couldn’t talk.’

item.description: The iconic 1970s disco group confirmed the death of their frontman on Wednesday.

item.description: ‘I just think we’re really missing a trick here.’

item.description: Politicians, lobbyists, journalists and staffers have donned their finest for the ‘Canberra bubble’-themed ball.

item.title: Alarming data shows how long kids are spending glued to screens amid growing health crisis
item.description: It's the addiction we're all guilty of, and experts warn it could become Australia's next major health crisis.

item.description: Is the world's biggest pop star about to tie the knot?

item.title: The tech bringing experts to the beds of regional patients where every minute can mean life or death
item.description: ‘We know that regional Australians are 17 per cent more likely and have higher risk factors. So getting that specialist care is critical.’

item.title: Lethal Weapon star Danny Glover reveals Alzheimer's diagnosis
item.description: ‘I don’t feel like it’s the end of my life. There’s work to do. I still have my daughter, I have friends. I want to just say, your life continues.’

item.description: The common-sense move is now in effect.

item.description: Cash is king when it comes to these collectables.

item.description: Rescue crews have pulled thousands of people from the rubble, as more remain missing.

item.title: Expert reveals how long it will take for falling prices to end housing costs crisis
item.description: An affordability gap has built up over years of property prices outpacing wages growth.

item.description: Simon Carman is accused of killing a 17-year-old girl he met in Thailand’s Pattaya red light district.

item.description: The Aussie swimwear brand was locked in a ‘David vs Goliath’ trademark battle with the rap star.

item.description: The ‌FBI is still treating the disappearance of Savannah Guthrie's mother as a kidnapping for ransom.

item.description: Experts say gamers will have serious concerns ‘around various aspects of this announcement’.

item.description: The couple in their 20s were arrested in Indonesia after a livestream showed the pair kissing in a car.

item.description: He spent eight days buried under the wreckage of a collapsed shopping mall parking lot.

item.description: The alleged sexual offences date back to 1978.

item.title: 'Night of horror': Russia bombards Kyiv in series of deadly attacks
item.description: Moscow has launched a massive missile and drone attack on Kyiv in what it says is revenge for strikes on Russian infrastructure.

item.description: German Chancellor Friedrich Merz and his coalition partners have introduced a reform package to revive the country's sluggish economy.

item.description: ‘I’m quite proud of myself.’

item.description: ‘Some days are a little easier, some days are really hard.’

item.description: Deputy Opposition Leader Jane Hume has defended not rushing through changes targeting tech giants.

item.description: The Blues medical team is working hard behind the scenes but say it’s too early to make the call.

item.description: Socceroos fever has gripped the nation.

item.description: A Ukrainian tycoon was the target of the attack and was wounded in the explosion.

item.description: Back pain is one of the leading causes of disability worldwide.

item.description: The long anticipated union of sports and song has brought hype to new heights in New York.

item.description: Authorities are keeping locals away from the beach until the mysterious cannisters can be removed.

item.description: US authorities were forced to cancel numerous 250th anniversary celebrations around the country as a ‘heat-dome’ endangers people’s health.

item.description: ‘I let my teammates down and I’m really sorry about that.’

item.title: Sarcoma diagnosis: The deadly cancer that survivors say is easy to miss

item.description: Organisers issued evacuation orders in Washington DC as storms gathered with the US president declaring the wild weather would ‘bring luck’.

item.title: The Morning Show: Australia's no. 1 Morning TV Show - Channel 7 | 7NEWS
item.description: The Morning Show with Larry Emdur and Kylie Gillies is the latest news, lifestyle, recipes, entertainment and weather. The Morning Show brings you a mix of news, entertainment, lifestyle and human interest stories - Weekdays from 9:00am across Australia.

item.description: Sunrise with Natalie Barr, Matt Shirvington, Edwina Bartholomew, Sam Mac and Mark Beretta is the latest news, sport, entertainment and weather. Win with the Cash Cow. Australia's most popular brekky show - Weekdays from 5:30am, weekends from 7am on Channel 7.

item.description: Follow along as we bring you all of the big crime, traffic and weather updates.

item.title: Aussie champions robbed of T20 World Cup moment after ‘insane’ delay for musical performance
item.description: Lord’s was emptied before the trophy presentation following one of cricket’s most baffling decisions yet.

item.title: Trump’s FIFA intervention sparks ‘astonishing’ World Cup storm as Folarin Balogun’s ban overturned
item.description: The football world is up in arms after a call from the White House led FIFA towards an extraordinary decision not seen since 1962.

item.title: Farizon F3E electric cab chassis launched in Australia
item.description: Farizon has added a cab chassis model to all-electric commercial vehicle range in Australia.

item.title: Norway superstar Erling Haaland comes alive as Brazil stunned by unlikely heroes
item.description: The Vikings’ leading man woke up and suddenly the five-time champions crashed to their worst result since 1990.

item.title: World No.1 Aryna Sabalenka ‘to go and get drunk’ after shock Wimbledon exit against Naomi Osaka
item.description: The top seed was left screaming in frustration as rejuvenated champion Naomi Osaka dominated

item.title: Best lunchtime snack: Oporto drops limited-edition Porto roll and mozzarella sticks
item.description: Tastes like a slice of Europe.

item.title: Anthony Albanese apologises for Kylie Minogue ‘shag, marry, date’ comments
item.description: The PM has been accused of making a ‘mockery of Labor’s claim to be champions of women’.
